input.issue: battery draining completely within 2 hours of a full charge
input.backstory: Priya bought this laptop 3 weeks ago for her freelance design work. She already contacted support once last week and was told to 'update drivers', which she did — but the problem persists. She has a client deadline tomorrow.
input.customer_message: I'm reaching out to support again, as the issue with my TechPro X200 Laptop (order ORD-7741) persists despite updating the drivers as suggested last week. The battery is still draining completely within 2 hours of a full charge, which is making it extremely difficult for me to meet my deadlines. I have a critical project due tomorrow and I urgently need a solution to this problem. Could you please help me resolve this issue today, as I'm running out of time and options?

nodes.value: my TechPro X200 Laptop (order ORD-7741) persists despite updating the drivers as suggested last week
today, as I'm running out of time and options

empathetic_output.support_response: Please know that we're doing everything possible to assist you in resolving this matter quickly so your work isn't impacted further - can you tell me what steps you've taken since our last conversation? We'll do all we can to expedite assistance on getting your device up and running smoothly before your deadline tomorrow morning.
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm reaching out to support again, as the issue with <ISSUE>. The battery is still draining completely within 2 hours of a full charge, which is making it extremely difficult for me to meet my deadlines. I have a critical project due tomorrow and I urgently need a solution to this problem. Could you please help me resolve this issue <ISSUE>?
empathetic_output.raw_steered_output: Please know that we're doing everything possible to assist you in resolving this matter quickly so your work isn't impacted further - can you tell me what steps you've taken since our last conversation? We'll do all we can to expedite assistance on getting your device up and running smoothly before your deadline tomorrow morning.

formal_output.support_response: Our technical team will investigate further into the matter regarding the rapid discharge of your device's battery. In light of your urgent deadline, we recommend contacting our priority assistance line at [phone number] so an expedited resolution can be arranged if necessary. A dedicated specialist will work closely with you to find a suitable remedy by tonight.
